name: check_quality
description: Check quality inspection results for a product or batch including pass/fail status and notes.

product_id.description: The product identifier to check quality inspections for.

product_name.description: The name of the product if the ID is unknown.

batch_id.description: The batch identifier to check quality inspections for.

name: get_compliance
description: Retrieve compliance status, certifications, and audit information for a product or supplier.

entity_id.description: The unique identifier of the entity to check compliance for.

entity_name.description: The name of the entity if the ID is unknown.

entity_type.description: The type of entity: product or supplier.

name: get_standards
description: Retrieve quality standards and requirements for a product category.

product_category.description: The product category to retrieve quality standards for.
